Ravi.0: Since the Sun (Ravi) is in the first house of your birth chart, your nature will be outspoken and generous. You may be a self-respecting, restless, and unstable wealthy person. Your mother may have a religious mindset and an interest in pilgrimages. Your younger siblings will be fortunate, and besides attaining high positions, they will get good results regarding friends. The educational level of your children will be advanced, and they may get opportunities to study abroad. You will benefit from the government. You will have good relations with powerful people in politics. Your father will progress because of you, and you will respect and obey him. Your life partner will also be from a good family. Your nature will be honest and religious, and your actions will be morally right. However, the Sun in this position can make your nature aggressive, sometimes irrational, careless, arrogant, and impatient. You will be an influential person. You may face problems related to your head and eyes. You might have appeared melancholic in childhood. There is a possibility of some income through animals and birds. The number of your children might be less.

You are lucky and wealthy, but the Sun here is not auspicious regarding extended family. You will be a skilled person in various tasks. As you grow older, you will become self-reliant. If you pursue the arts, you will achieve a good position in this field. You will own a good vehicle. You will benefit from the government or government work. Your children will be happy, although problems may arise for your life partner in the middle part of life.

The people who respect you will also be of a gentle nature. You will be endowed with various arts and skills, clever in all tasks, loved by all, and a learned person.
Shukra.1: Venus is sitting in the second place in your birth chart. Venus sitting here will enhance the beauty of your face. Along with your teeth being beautiful and attractive, you will be intelligent, learned, famous, devoted to your teacher/guru, respectful of friends, religious, polite, a lover of beauty, kind, philanthropic, worshiped by the king, grateful, soft-spoken, with sharp intelligence, and full of religious feelings. Your nature will be sociable, and you will be seen speaking ethical things. You will have knowledge of various types of disciplines. You believe in your traditional family deities. Your storehouse will be full of clothes and wealth. You may have a high interest in acts of charity. If you are of good character, your name will spread far and wide. You can also earn wealth through the business of silver, glass, gems, etc., besides through some special occult knowledge. You will always continue to get excellent and tasty food. You can also be of a luxurious nature. Because of your luxurious quality, you easily get close to women. You will have some connection with things related to beauty. Besides excellent vehicles, you will continue to get good clothes, jewelry, and wealth.
Shukra.2: Venus is sitting in the third place in your birth chart. You will have a lot of enthusiasm. You will be polite, cheerful, and a tactful person. You will like working while moving around. Your conversation will also be sweet. You may have knowledge of various types of arts, skills, and languages. You do not go and fight with anyone upfront, although you will always remain worried about your safety. You succeed in whatever work you intend to do. Your interest may be in poetry, music, and painting. You are a learned, wealthy, disease-free, majestic person, revered by people associated with the government, and a lucky person. You will have an interest in acquiring knowledge. At the age of 29, you may gain wealth. You will get the happiness of siblings, although a couple of problems may arise in the matter of children. Still, everything will be fine later. You will get help from brothers, friends, and neighbors. You will also get an opportunity to travel. You will be able to become the main person of an event. When you get angry, try to control it, and also do not get too disappointed in times of trouble. Your marriage may be delayed or you may face a couple of problems regarding marriage. But, if you remain honest (truthful) after marriage, these problems will go away.
Shukra.3: Venus is sitting in the fourth place in your birth chart. Venus sitting in this place will give you benefits in most cases. Along with having a beautiful body, you will be a philanthropic person. You can be a very talkative person, as well as tactful, valiant, and a person who can always remain happy. Your heart will also be generous, and you will be a person who wishes well for others. You will have an interest in religious activities, and there will also be a feeling of happiness in your mind. You will also have a lot of interest in works related to worship and festivals. Seeing others happy, you also seem to become happy or something like that can happen. In the case of sorrow as well, you will remain sad in the same way. You can also be called rich in terms of intelligence and education. One day people will respect you. You will also get respect and honor from big people. You will also benefit from the royal family, or your house will progress after you are born. You yourself will be devoted to your mother or one who serves your mother. You will get adequate happiness from your mother, along with all kinds of material happiness. You will be able to get various comforts like a good house, vehicle, jewelry, beautiful clothes, etc. The personality of your life partner will also be beautiful and attractive. But even after having all such things, you will be the kind of person who remains worried about the financial side.
Shukra.4: Venus is sitting in the fifth place in your birth chart. Venus sitting in this place can be called auspicious. You are a beautiful and virtuous person. A generous person with faith in God. With a little effort, you will acquire wealth. You will have extreme faith in acts of charity. You will be learned, influential, and a good speaker. You also have a yoga for getting sudden wealth from somewhere. Your connection can be with scriptures and mantras. You may also have an interest in poetry and writing. You will be adept in music and arts. Your interest will also be seen in drama, cinema, etc. Along with your behavior being good, you will also be justice-loving. There is also a possibility of gain from the government. You will like the company of the opposite sex. Therefore, you will also be at the forefront in matters of love affairs, etc. You will be able to get various types of vehicle comforts. Friends will also be good and trustworthy. In domestic matters, your behavior can be like an outsider; you may remain busy in your own work. You will have the good fortune to eat good food. The situation is also good for you in the case of children.
Shukra.5: Venus is sitting in the sixth place in your birth chart. Venus located here will give you auspicious results as well as some inauspicious results. You will be able to be the best in your lineage, well-educated, and sensible. But Venus in this place can make you timid. You may be disliked by women and an opponent of your guru. You will continue to face problems from enemies. Still, in the end, you will be able to achieve victory over your enemies. You will get happiness from your brother and maternal uncle. The number of your bad friends may be higher than good friends. The place of children is good for you. You may not get that much benefit from your life partner, or a couple of problems may arise, or a secret problem may occur. After marriage, if you eat food on time, no problem arises. Your expenses can also be more than necessary. It may also happen that instead of spending in the right place, you are spending in inappropriate places. You may not get that much profit from an independent business either.
Shukra.6: Venus is sitting in the seventh place in your birth chart. Venus sitting in this place will give you both good and bad results. You will be a popular person of generous nature, although in some cases you will be seen worried. You will be a lucky person who has love and respect for ascetics. Even though you are restless, you will be a person who likes luxury and music. With a little effort, you will be able to get all kinds of comfortable things. Your tactfulness and cleverness will be able to mesmerize everyone. In appearance too, you are the owner of an attractive personality. You may have an interest in singing, playing instruments, and acting. You will also be a skilled person in the matter of sexuality (lust). For some people, Venus sitting in this place also gets them married early. Besides, sometimes it can also cause a second marriage. Based on values (samskaras), it can be controlled. After marriage, your fortune will rise. You will get happiness from your wife. But you will have to stay away from excessive adultery and luxury. You will get many opportunities to travel abroad or make long journeys and live abroad. There will be gain from the government. Some problems may arise in the lower part of the waist.
Shukra.7: Venus is sitting in the eighth place in your birth chart. Due to Venus located in this place, you will be beautiful in appearance, and there will be pride in your nature. You are a strong, fearless, learned, religious, well-behaved person capable of remaining happy. You will believe in astrology and transcendental (supernatural) subjects. You may get any one of physical, financial, or female happiness in an adequate amount. Wealth can also be obtained through a life partner or a woman, or wealth can also be obtained through a trust. You can be a royal servant or a state-honored person. You can be a person fond of tourism and will continue to get opportunities for foreign travel. Subordinate employees may be with you. You will get the happiness of friends. It is because of Venus that sometimes along with getting the happiness of wealth, the 'happiness' of debt (a situation of taking a loan) will also be obtained. Sometimes there can also be interruptions in the field of work. Still, you will be able to achieve victory over your enemies. It will be good for you to do right actions by avoiding unnecessary wandering and disputes. Only then will you be able to pay off your father's debt as well. Besides, sometimes you may also be worried about your life partner and children.
Shukra.8: Venus is sitting in the ninth place in your birth chart. Due to Venus being in this place, your physical condition can be strong. You will be religious, pure-hearted, philanthropic, virtuous, a believer in God, a pure soul, one who goes on holy pilgrimages, and a person who chants and does penance. You will be a kind, generous, and contented person who finds happiness by serving elders, deities, and guests. You will have an interest in singing, playing instruments, cinema, or other arts, or you yourself can be skilled in these fields. You can be a good actor, you will have an interest in poetic dramas, and you will enjoy acquiring knowledge. At your level, you will be counted as a wealthy person. You will be able to earn a lot of wealth on the strength of your muscle power. You can also earn wealth by giving money on loan to others. You will have a lot of financial gain, along with receiving all kinds of material happiness. Furthermore, you will be able to become a royal person who wears excellent clothes. You will be able to be more successful after marriage. This position of Venus can also sometimes give auspicious results in the case of the father.
Shukra.9: Venus is sitting in the tenth place in your birth chart. This position of Venus will make your body beautiful and also make your personality attractive. Your nature will be calm and sociable, so you will always want to stay away from disputes. Your moral conduct will also be good. You will be of a religious and reverent nature. You will also have an interest in worship, charity, etc. Along with being famous, people will also respect you. You will be able to become a good speaker. You will receive wealth in adequate amounts. Gold, silver, etc. will also remain with you. There will also be gain from the government. You can also get government posts and prestige. Generally, you will be able to fully obtain the thing you desire to get. You will be able to become the favorite of people of the opposite sex. Your marriage will take place in a good family. After marriage, fortune will rise and wealth will be gained. You will receive benefit and respect from your life partner. You will have an interest in singing, playing instruments, literature composition, painting, etc. Your life will be happy, and you will get the opportunity to travel abroad.
Shukra.10: Venus is sitting in the eleventh place in your birth chart. Venus located in this place will give you extremely auspicious results. Your nature will be attractive, virtuous, of a good disposition, philanthropic, interested in music, and you will have a disease-free body. You will like music very much. The people in your house may also like music. Your nature will be generous and of good conduct. You are a person endowed with excellent qualities, humorous, and one who speaks the truth. You will always be interested only in good deeds. Your nature will be religious, and you will have knowledge of the scriptures. You will be knowledgeable and a devotee of God. Society will recognize you because of your eloquence. You will be able to get various types of vehicle comforts. All kinds of happiness and prosperity will also exist in your home. The inflow of money will continue regularly, and with the passage of time, wealth will also continue to increase. Along with the possibility of gaining from jewelers and royal (government) persons, there is also a possibility of gaining from women. You will also be able to become an author or writer. There will also be profit in the building construction business. There is a possibility of you making a profit after marriage.
Shukra.11: Venus is sitting in the twelfth place in your birth chart. Due to Venus sitting in this place, you will be able to become a radiant person endowed with wealth and luxury. You will be seen respecting virtuous people, and you yourself will also be a person who does excellent work. Virtuous people will also be seen respecting you. There will be no shortage of wealth and property in your life. You do not spend money unnecessarily, although you will be seen spending a lot of money for your own luxury and enjoyment. You will be seen feeling happy by spending money on good deeds. You will also be a skilled person in the field of sexuality (lust). Your marriage can happen sooner than expected. You can be the center of attraction for people of the opposite sex. You will be seen trying to give happiness to everyone through your conduct, and you will be able to succeed in this as well. In the number of friends, the number of women will be higher. As an inauspicious result, Venus in this place will give you lust. At a certain time, your body weight can also increase. Sometimes you will also be seen spending money on unnecessary tasks. There will also be a possibility of having discord with relatives. Sometimes you can maintain good relations with opponents even without understanding their minds. If you maintain illicit relations after marriage, you will face problems in the future.

Shani.0: Saturn (Shani) is sitting in the first place in your birth chart. Saturn sitting in this place will give you both good and bad results from time to time. You can be a lover of solitude, melancholic, determined, stubborn, long-lived, and virtuous. You want to keep yourself away from deceitful people. A deep impression of your personality will be left on the mind of a person meeting you for the first time. You can attain rights like a king. There will also be gain from the government. If you keep working hard, you will be able to become wealthy and happy. No matter how strong your opponent is, you will be able to achieve victory over him. You can be the head of a village or city. In the early period of life, you will face some problems, but due to hard work, self-confidence, and patience, you will be able to become successful. To get good results from Saturn, you will have to associate yourself with good deeds, give up laziness, and avoid unnecessary disputes. There will be a fear of getting arthritis (rheumatism).
Shani.1: Saturn is sitting in the second place in your birth chart. Saturn sitting in this place will sometimes make you a sweet-spoken person and sometimes give a harsh tone to your conversation. You may have to stay away from your family. You will be able to get your desired object at a distant place in your own country or abroad. It may also happen that in the second part of life, you will leave your place and start residing in another place and be able to earn wealth. You will not have much progress at your own place or near your birthplace. You will be a favorite of the king. You are frugal (economical), cautious, and a visionary person. Even after having such qualities, if you are not able to accumulate wealth, then think about investing money and think about its proper utilization so that you cannot easily withdraw the money. In this way, your property will increase. If you do finance work, it will be profitable. This position of Saturn can put you in an inauspicious situation like a second marriage. Therefore, it will be better if you do every work thoughtfully. It seems you do not fear enemies at all. You are a justice-loving person. Since Saturn is the god of justice, it is better if all work is done honestly. Good conduct, honesty, good behavior towards saints, giving up greed, and trying to speak sweetly will reduce the problems caused by Saturn.
Shani.2: Saturn is sitting in the third place in your birth chart. You will be highly intelligent, prudent, strong, majestic, quick to complete tasks, healthy, someone who speaks necessary things, and a person who gives good advice. Saturn sitting in this place will prepare you as a just, authentic, and clever person. Your interest will be in subjects related to astrology and transcendental (supernatural) fields. You can be one who defeats enemies, lucky, and of a restless nature. You will be seen helping everyone without discrimination, and if possible, you can also nurture them. You can achieve fame at a high level, along with having an excellent vehicle, and you can be the head of a village or city and a respected person of the state. The number of your friends will also be quite large, and you will be popular among people of the opposite sex. You will also earn a lot of money. You can be seen as lazy and sad in some areas. Some unrest may reside in your mind. In the matter of education as well, education will be attained only through hard work. During rainy and cold weather, your physical health may not be that good.
Shani.3: Saturn is sitting in the fourth place in your birth chart. Due to Saturn located in this place, you will be serious, patient, a spendthrift, justice-loving, hospitable, a believer in philanthropy, virtuous, wealthy, generous, and calm. You will be able to earn wealth in abundant quantities. You will have various types of vehicles. You may gain money and property from other people. You will be able to earn a lot of money even by staying away from home. The ages of 16, 22, 24, 27, and 36 can be profitable for you. During this time, you may get auspicious results like a job, marriage, children, or similar things. Despite this, Saturn sitting in this place has sometimes been seen causing trouble up to the age of 36. After this, you will attain happiness up to the age of 56. There is also a possibility of you benefiting from enemies. Due to Saturn, there may be a lack of physical happiness. Friendship can be formed with bad people. You may have to face mental worry or suffering. It will not be auspicious in the case of the mother either. The mother will suffer from time to time. Your domestic situation may also not be that auspicious, and along with domestic discord, sometimes thoughts of a second marriage may also come. You can also waste your father's money, or you may be deprived of your father's property.
Shani.4: Saturn is sitting in the fifth place in your birth chart. Saturn sitting in this place will give you both good and bad results. You will be intelligent, learned, hardworking, a traveler, cheerful, happy, long-lived, victorious over enemies, a righteous soul, and it will also give you the quality of restlessness. Saturn in this place indicates having your own child after adopting someone else's child. Your child may be delayed. Sometimes after having one child, the second child may happen after many years or something similar. Whatever your mind says, you can do that kind of work, and you also give more importance to your own work. Saturn can also sometimes cause problems in the field of education. You may be lazy and physically weak in some cases. Harshness can come into your behavior. You may not be much attracted to deities and religion. If you become irreligious, you will see that your money will start decreasing, and this effect of Saturn will also fall on your wealth and property.
Shani.5: Saturn is sitting in the sixth place in your birth chart. Saturn sitting in this place will give you auspicious results in most cases. Your body will be beautiful, strong, digestion power will be good, along with this you will feel more hungry, you will have an interest in eating and drinking, and you will be strong and healthy. You can be a good speaker as well as skilled in arguing. Your opponents will fear you. You will be a person with friends, who takes care of his friends, and who provides shelter to many people. You do not have the fear of the king (fear of government or administration). You can have many people working under you. Your enemies will not only fear you but will also respect you. You will have to avoid being arrogant. You will also have to keep yourself away from indulging in sensual pleasures. If you do this, you will be able to be more benefited in life. Due to being physically strong, you seem to fear no one, but you will be seen respecting elders. You will also have faith in charity. You will be seen respecting learned people, and you will also obey the orders of a pundit (learned person). You will be able to become a person who tests qualities and performs excellent deeds.
Shani.6: Saturn is sitting in the seventh place in your birth chart. Saturn sitting in this place will not give good results in personal life. If you work as a contractor, with coal, iron items, work related to foreign countries, as an agent of foreign goods, teacher, professor, astrologer (calculator), etc., you will be able to benefit. The upper part of your life partner's body may not be that beautiful. Financial gain can happen through marriage. Sometimes a second marriage is also possible. After the second marriage, your fortune will rise. But due to the condition of the life partner not being right, a couple of problems may arise in married life. Thoughts of remaining unmarried may keep coming to your mind. Children may also be delayed. In childhood, problems related to parents may arise. At the age of 52 and 53, the life partner may suffer. Your children may suffer, or some worry and fear may remain in your mind. Financial problems that come from time to time can also make you restless. Physical diseases can also cause problems.
Shani.7: Saturn is sitting in the eighth place in your birth chart. Saturn sitting in this place can make the size of your body larger than necessary, and sometimes you can also earn wealth through marriage or it can give some other benefit. You will be a strong, learned, eloquent, kind-hearted, fearless, clever, generous-natured person as well as a knower of occult knowledge. You can also benefit as an heir. If you do a job, it will be good for you. Even if there are problems in some matters in the early part of life, the later period will be good. Generally, fortune will rise after the age of 36. Premonition of some special things will be seen happening in advance. It will seem as if you know many things in advance. Despite laziness coming in some cases, you will be a very intelligent person. Mentally, there can be a couple of dissatisfactions. A feeling of anger and a lack of enthusiasm can be seen. You will easily recognize the faults and shortcomings of the other person. You may have to live far away from your birthplace. If you purify your nature and stay in good company, it will be very good for you.
Shani.8: Saturn is sitting in the ninth place in your birth chart. Saturn of this place will only give you mixed results. Your nature will be traveling, courageous, doing auspicious deeds, thoughtful, charitable, kind, soft-spoken, having mild behavior towards others, of a pure nature, and a righteous soul. For this reason, you will become the center of attraction for everyone. Although you are a soft-natured person, you will be seen as strict in matters of making decisions. You will have an interest in spirituality. You will have an interest in pilgrimages, astrology, and tantra-mantra, etc. It will be good if you can practice yoga. You will be able to become a famous person. In the remaining time of your life, you will do such works that even when you are not there, their impact will remain. You are a lucky person. Some lower-level people or bad people can also help in the rise of your fortune. You are a lover of solitude and do not joke around, speak less, or it is very difficult to understand you, or you may appear thoughtful (contemplative); yet, you will have to avoid insulting or disrespecting others, otherwise, the path to your downfall will open. You can be a teacher, lawyer, or you can also practice astrology. Never become miserly, selfish, a cheat, or narrow-minded. If this happens, some problems may arise over time.
Shani.9: Saturn is sitting in the tenth place in your birth chart. Due to Saturn being in this place, you will always be happy, able to do virtuous deeds, besides being loved by people, you will be able to become a politician, of polite nature, an honorable person among people, hardworking, clever, self-respecting, able to become influential in your lineage, of religious conduct, and also an astrologer. You will be able to become the best among individuals and a ruler. Leadership qualities will be found in abundance in you. You can also become the leader of a city, village, or community. You will also be able to become famous by doing public service and social service. You will be able to shape your future on the strength of your valor. Your dedication to work will be the credit for all your big successes. You will continue to attain the happiness of livelihood in life only slowly. Progress in your field of work will continue to happen slowly. You will be adept in royal (government) works. As a judge, your decision will be correct in all matters. You will also continue to get opportunities to go abroad. You will always win in disputes/debates. You can achieve a high post and prestige during your lifetime. This post can also be in the social sphere. If you have laziness, you should give it up. You need to wake up early in the morning.
Shani.10: Saturn is sitting in the eleventh place in your birth chart. Saturn located in this place will give you auspicious results in most cases. You are kind, philanthropic, sweet-spoken, contented, long-lived, powerful, able to achieve victory over enemies, of stable intelligence, lucky, devoid of greed, happy, a consumer of comforts, thoughtful, a universally accepted person with knowledge of various disciplines. You will not have any long-term disease, meaning even if you get any disease, it will be cured quickly. At one time, you will have an adequate amount of wealth and property. You will continue to get financial gains from the king (government) or anyone else. You will get benefits from pundits and scholars. With time, vehicle comfort will be attained. You will be able to accumulate wealth. Because of Saturn, you will be able to become a famous person, and you will also get good company. You will be able to attain various types of happiness. There can also be people doing different kinds of work in the house. There may be a delay in having children. You should never deceive anyone, nor should you have bad feelings towards anyone, and you should not do bad to anyone, otherwise, struggles can come in life.
Shani.11: Saturn is sitting in the twelfth place in your birth chart. Due to Saturn sitting in this place, you will become a lover of solitude; besides, you will be a renouncer, a kind person, related to courts and charity houses, having the quality to easily defeat enemies, wanting to accumulate wealth through secret thinking, gaining from easy tasks, interested in big donations and yajnas, and a person who can become the leader of a crowd. You will have the quality to be a lawyer or an astrologer. You will have the quality to do a business that the other person has not thought of. As an inauspicious result of Saturn, you can be shameless and harsh in some matters. You can also do some work by telling lies. Any one organ of your body can be weak. Do not consume meat and alcohol. A time may come in life when you feel like drinking alcohol or you may be forced to. Excluding that situation, the rest of your time will pass well. Eye diseases or blood disorders (blood infection) can occur. Do not spend unnecessarily. You should always try to maintain a feeling of love with your loved ones. A couple of problems may arise in the case of the wife; maybe before marriage or after marriage.

Rahu.0: Rahu is sitting in the first place in your birth chart. Rahu planet sitting in this place will give you mixed results. You are patient, intelligent, tactful, a person who behaves well with elders, philanthropic, body is medium in terms of health (diseases), you will not face a shortage of money, and money will definitely come from somewhere. You will spend others' money on your work and will also give them profit from that money. During your lifetime, you will be able to enjoy various types of pleasures. You will be able to become an influential person. You will be able to go from a low level to a high level and will be able to achieve superiority in the eyes of people. Even though you are a person who does courageous deeds, some problems may arise in the field of education. Still, you will be skilled in practical tasks and will have the ability to get work done by others. You are a man of your word, although the inauspicious quality of doubting other people will be with you. You will have a problem in recognizing good people, like you will consider even a bad person as a good person. You want other people to follow your words, and because of this, you will have to become bad from the perspective of other people, or they will not love you as much as you think. Therefore, you should try to correct your inauspicious deeds (habits).
Rahu.1: Rahu is sitting in the second place in your birth chart. Rahu planet sitting in this place will give you both good and bad qualities. During your lifetime, you will be able to be happy, attain glory and respect, gain wealth if living in a foreign place, and be able to earn abundant wealth. People will trust you, although you will not be able to fully keep that trust. Still, you are a tactful person. You will be a wealthy person. There is a possibility of gaining from the king, royal persons, or the government. You will be able to easily defeat enemies. You will like traveling to other places, although obstacles will continue to come in work. The stability of your works may be less. You can believe in telling lies. You may keep fewer relations with relatives, or you may talk less. Whenever you say anything, say it carefully, because what you say can be bad for someone too. There can be a defect in your speech. Your money will keep getting spent. In terms of expenses, it can be in your domestic or other areas. Overall, you will have trouble saving money. Talking about education, you may not get the desired results in the beginning, because you will go to school or college and forget the things you read at home.
Rahu.2: Rahu is sitting in the third place in your birth chart. Rahu planet sitting in this place is the planet that destroys your sorrows. You will be strong, disease-free, will have a lot of muscle power, valiant, courageous, enterprising, majestic, of firm judgment, interested in travel, learned, lucky, with sharp intelligence but of restless nature, famous, established, believing in charity, a person who wants to have friendly behavior with everyone and wants to respect everyone. Your fame and glory will spread far and wide. You do not intentionally discriminate against anyone. Whatever behavior you have, it will come from the heart. In any field, things will continue to be received without much effort. You will have all kinds of luxury items. You do not fear anyone and sometimes you can be suspicious, careless, and can become arrogant. Sometimes what you say to someone can become bad. It will be better if you can stay well with your neighbors. You may face a couple of problems in the case of brother and sister.
Rahu.3: Rahu is sitting in the fourth place in your birth chart. You will be able to become a courageous person. There can be gain from the royal power or government, or gain from a high-ranking official. There is a possibility of getting benefits from some administrative person. Maternal happiness will be obtained. You will have various types of clothes and various types of jewelry. You will get less opportunity to stay at your birthplace. You may have to stay away from your place. You will like traveling a lot. In the case of other big progress, Rahu will give you problems, although it will give you relief in the field of jobs. You will benefit in work related to partnership. Rahu can sometimes give you a second marriage, or you can have relations with two people, or it can create problems in marriage. Still, your life partner will support you even in adverse situations. From the age of 36 to the age of 56, your luck will help you more than required. But Rahu sitting in an inauspicious state can give mental unrest. Even if you have all kinds of resources, there will remain some sorrow in your mind or a feeling of lack like not getting something.
Rahu.4: Rahu is sitting in the fifth place in your birth chart. Due to Rahu in this place, you will be able to become kind, enthusiastic towards work, lucky, troubled in the case of a son, successful in companies and business, skilled in the art of writing, gaining fame as well as a person with sharp intelligence. You will have knowledge of various scriptures or subjects. The inauspicious effect of Rahu will confuse you; suffering or trouble can come to children. Unnecessary expenditure will give a problem like poverty, like bank balance being very low. Sometimes you can take wrong decisions. Along with worry in the mind, a situation like remorse can arise. A couple of problems may arise in acquiring education. You may have stomach-related problems. You will be able to accumulate wealth only after a lot of effort. You will also suffer in the case of your life partner, like maybe they will stay away or some other problem may arise.
Rahu.5: Rahu is sitting in the sixth place in your birth chart. Rahu sitting in this place will be a warder of evils for you. It will destroy your sorrows and pains. You will be a generous-hearted, patient, intelligent, disease-free, long-lived, courageous, able to do big works, valiant, and powerful person. You will be a destroyer of enemies and along with defeating them, you will become famous and able to receive royal recognition. The grace of the government will remain upon you. You will gain profit and wealth from people of other religions. You will also benefit from people of the absolute lowest level. You will be able to become a rich man. You can be endowed with clothes, vehicles, and jewelry. You are a lucky person. You will also have a lot of money. Your life partner will also be good. Inauspicious Rahu can create problems in the matter of your company (association). Instability can come in your job. Problems like ghosts and spirits or diseases related to some mystery can arise. You may also have to face disputes. The place of your maternal uncle and uncle will also not be auspicious.
Rahu.6: Rahu is sitting in the seventh place in your birth chart. Rahu sitting in this place will not be that auspicious. You are efficient, full of cleverness, like traveling a lot, your marriage can happen early or very late. You do not want to work under anyone. You will always want to remain independent. The life partner will be good. The love of your life partner will increase in the middle part of life. Your workplace will generally be good. No matter how many good deeds you do, you will always have to hear bad things. Your nature is angry by disposition, and sometimes you can fight or argue over some things. You can be arrogant in some matters and may not be satisfied with some works, and sometimes you can also become fierce. Your association can be with some bad (inauspicious) people. By staying with bad people, sometimes you can hurt good people too. You should avoid greed and unnecessary wandering. Try to be religious as much as possible. Married life may not be happy. Maybe there is a difference of opinion between the two or you have to stay away from each other. You may also stay away in connection with the workplace.
Rahu.7: Rahu is sitting in the eighth place in your birth chart. Your body will be strong. You are a person who performs excellent deeds. The rise of fortune can happen between the ages of 24 and 36. You may have to live far away from your birthplace. You will be respected by the king, government representatives, and pundits, as well as an honorable person and worthy of praise by the people. You can also get wealth in huge quantities from the royal side (government), and sometimes there can also be a huge wastage of wealth. Still, you will be wealthy. Your old age will be very happy. If you have an interest in rearing cows, you could have obtained livestock in abundant quantities. A premonition of many things in life can happen in advance. Besides, you can be timid and lazy in some matters, and by nature, you can also be of the type who takes things to heart quickly. You can talk too much. You can also do some such works which may not be auspicious from a religious or social point of view. You can be deprived of ancestral wealth. You can get trouble from brothers and friends. Due to the excess of expenses, you may face trouble in accumulating wealth. You can get problems related to speech and accidents.
Rahu.8: Rahu is sitting in the ninth place in your birth chart. By nature, you will be able to become virtuous, with pure thoughts, with high willpower, working for the welfare of the world, loving family members, hardworking, having faith in God, merciful, righteous, kind, civilized, with a true heart, interested in pilgrimages, learned, worshipable due to your qualities, honorable and respectable among people. Due to your clever nature, you can surprise a full assembly. You will have reverence and faith in deities and pilgrimages. You can also earn merit by donating wealth. You do not suddenly forget the favor someone has done for you. You try to keep the words of big people or respectable people and want to walk on the path shown by them. You do not like leaving any work halfway. If Rahu is conjunct with malefic planets and debilitated, disbelief towards religion can arise. You should always wear good clothes and it is necessary to keep good relations with brothers/sisters and friends.
Rahu.9: Rahu is sitting in the tenth place in your birth chart. You are strong, fearless, worried in some matters, intelligent, philanthropic, of a proud nature; with time your ego will continue to decrease. Besides, your interest may be in poetics or poetry, and you can be a writer and editor. You can be an officer or head of a society, village, or city, or an officer of some other similar post. You can achieve success, respect, fame, and superiority throughout your life. You will get the benefit of bathing in the Ganges. You can perform yajna (sacrificial) work, besides you will be able to easily destroy enemies. You will be adept in business, as well as a person who travels. Court-related work can come up. In the early period of life, you will get trouble, although the later life will be good. Do not bring a feeling of carelessness into your mind. You should do your work on time, and it would be better if you can avoid unnecessary arrogance and intoxication.
Rahu.10: Rahu is sitting in the eleventh place in your birth chart. Rahu planet sitting in this place will destroy your evils (arishta). You can be physically nourished, hardworking, luxurious, a poet, wealthy, enjoying various pleasures, long-lived, capable of subduing your senses if you wish, attractive, knowledgeable about scriptures or other subjects, and of a type who speaks less. You can be learned, of a humorous nature, and restless; besides, you will be a leader in the society you live in. You will be able to attain an advanced position and prestige. You will have friendship with clever and intelligent persons. You will be able to get many types of benefits in your life. Wealth and property will continue to be gained. Some people having Rahu in this place have also been seen acquiring wealth even going outside the rules. You will be able to earn wealth from people outside your place or from abroad. You will get various types of vehicle comforts. But you can be arrogant regarding some fields, besides you can waste your energy by falling into unnecessary disputes. You will have to avoid earning wealth by doing inauspicious deeds, otherwise, problems related to children can arise.
Rahu.11: Rahu is sitting in the twelfth place in your birth chart. Due to Rahu sitting in this place, you will be a person with high ideals, valiant, famous, sociable by nature, happy as a result of hard work, philanthropic, interested in Vedas and Vedanta, and of a saintly nature. You will be able to easily attain knowledge in the spiritual field. You will benefit from an organization. Even if you sit in one place, the desires of your mind will continue to be fulfilled in that place too. Sometimes even after many efforts, you will get some trouble, although in the end, you will be able to get good results. Due to Rahu, enemies will continue to be destroyed. It is possible that some trouble may come in the early period and you may have to go far away from your place. But later everything will be fine. You will get benefits only upon going far away from your birthplace. Your fortune will also rise only then. A time will come when you will get a lot of wealth. Even if you think of saving money, you will not be able to save it. You may have the quality of not expressing your mind's words easily. You should avoid sinful acts, irrational acts, lowly acts, and deceitful acts, otherwise, struggles can come in life.

Ketu.0: Ketu is sitting in the first place in your birth chart. Ketu sitting in this place will not be able to give you auspicious results in most cases. Despite this, even amidst inauspicious results, you will be able to get some auspicious results. You will be able to become rich on the basis of your hard work. You are a hardworking person who believes in hard work; initially, you will get cooperation from brothers and sisters, but later you will suffer from them and you will have to bear it too. In the case of siblings, it may also happen that they are having trouble in their livelihood or you have a conflict with them. Besides, as inauspicious results, a feeling of fear in the mind, restlessness, anxiety from fear, worry, mental stress, illusion, friendship with bad people, believing in telling lies, not getting the desired result in education despite trying, regretting in the future due to deliberate mistakes made in education. A tendency to run away when a slight problem arises will keep coming to mind. A couple of problems may arise in the case of the life partner. It may be that they stay away from you, or there could be trouble at the time of marriage or some other problem. There will remain a fear of bad (inauspicious) people. Making friends with good people will yield good results in life. You may get stomach-related problems.
Ketu.1: Ketu is sitting in the second place in your birth chart. You will be a pure person, and as a good result, you will be happy, prosperous, it will give you financial gain, you can speak sweetly at various times; yet as an inauspicious result, you may remain desperate/anxious to get a thing, in some cases you will be confused, sometimes you will feel that luck did not support you, words or feelings like sorrow and grief can be seen running in the mind, a couple of problems may also appear in work. In the field of education too, it will seem as if you forgot the things read at home after going to the exam. In some cases, you can also be seen going against religion. You may prefer the company of smaller (lower level) people more. If there is money in hand, it will be spent, and financial trouble may arise. You should avoid unnecessary expenditure. Oral diseases or speech-related problems can occur. You may speak less, or there may be a problem while talking, or sometimes even if you say a good thing, it can become bad for the other person. There may be a lack of fluency or smoothness while greeting or giving a speech. You will have few friends, and relations with relatives may be less. There will be a feeling of fear from the royal side (government) and administration. It cannot be said to be that auspicious in business.
Ketu.2: Ketu is sitting in the third place in your birth chart. Ketu planet will give you both good and bad results. But the number of inauspicious results can be higher than auspicious results. As an inauspicious result, unnecessary worries will keep coming to your mind. There will be some kind of fear in the mind. Suddenly some fear will come to mind, you can become distracted with worry. You can believe in ghosts and spirits or you can consider ghosts and spirits as deities, or you can have some connection with ghosts and spirits. You can also have social fear. You will not get that much auspicious result in the case of brothers. A couple of problems may also arise in the case of friends. There will also be a possibility of harm from friends. You may suffer from your hand or arm. You should always avoid disputes and arguments, only then life will be happy. Ketu sitting in this place will make you strong as well as make you patient. You believe in charity, so your name will also come up in the case of charitable people; wealthy, getting the happiness of a wife and food, famous, you will be able to suppress enemies, and the enemy will also fear you.
Ketu.3: Ketu is sitting in the fourth place in your birth chart. Ketu sitting in this place will give you both good and bad results. But the number of inauspicious results can be higher than auspicious results. You can be one who believes in speaking the truth, along with being strong, you will get the happiness of being soft-spoken, wealthy, brothers' happiness, and friends' happiness. This place of Ketu generally cannot be said to be auspicious. Ketu planet will give you sorrow in various fields. Along with being restless, you can also be eloquent. Sometimes you can speak more than necessary. You may not be that serious about your work either. Suddenly there may be a feeling of decreased enthusiasm in some works. In the minds of people, you will not be counted as an honest or good person. They may look down upon you. Besides, there may be a lack of maternal happiness, or you may feel that you are not coordinating well with your mother. You can also get trouble from friends. Therefore, it will be better to choose good (true) friends. This place will also not be auspicious in the case of ancestral property. Ancestral wealth/father's wealth may be destroyed due to you, or you may be deprived of ancestral property. Your relatives or friends may be involved in this matter. You may have to live in another place away from your place, but friends will somehow come to you at all times, or you will go looking for friends. But in the end, that friend will also not stay with you. Financial problems will not leave your side. Money will keep coming but will also be spent. There will be fear of poison hazards.
Ketu.4: Ketu is sitting in the fifth place in your birth chart. Due to Ketu sitting in this place, you will be able to become a strong person. Some problems may arise in the case of children. Your child may be dear to your friends (male/female friends). Despite being more valiant, you will be seen taking more interest in doing a job. There will be employees or servants working under you. You will like going on pilgrimages and staying away from your home or living abroad. You also have a yoga of getting livestock. You will be able to earn wealth through both good and bad means. From the point of view of yoga, your brothers and sisters will be able to be happy. Other people will easily accept the advice given by you. The desire to live and work abroad will always remain. As an inauspicious result, Ketu can reduce your patience. Negative and unnecessary thoughts will always keep coming. Taking wrong decisions will lead to regret in the end, but it may be too late by then. Physical and mental anguish (suffering) can come from your confused knowledge. You may have a dispute with your own brother. There may be a lack of happiness from a son, or you may stay away from your son. Stomach problems can occur.
Ketu.5: Ketu is sitting in the sixth place in your birth chart. You are the beloved of your brothers and a person of generous character, virtuous, determined, attaining a high position in a lifetime, achieving desired goals (Ishta siddhi), gaining from animals and birds, famous, and will get fame because of your knowledge. Ketu sitting in this place will make your body disease-free. Even if any disease comes, it will be cured quickly. You will be able to suppress your enemies and easily achieve victory in disputes/debates. You will believe in saving money by not spending unnecessarily. Along with various types of auspicious results, you will also receive inauspicious results. In some cases, you may also be eager to fight. Obstacles from ghosts and spirits can occur. In the case of the maternal uncle's side, Ketu sitting in this place will not give auspicious results. The maternal side (maternal uncle's family) will not be that auspicious, or your visits with them may be less, or there may be some other problem too. There may be a lack of happiness from the maternal uncle, or there may be differences with the maternal uncle. Tooth or lip-related problems can occur. But you will be able to be victorious in various types of competitive exams and disputes.
Ketu.6: Ketu is sitting in the seventh place in your birth chart. Ketu sitting in this place can be said to be somewhat auspicious in the case of money. You will be able to enjoy the happiness of wealth. In most cases, Ketu sitting in this place will only give inauspicious results. Due to Ketu, there is a possibility of your intellect being clouded (delusion), and you will be seen doing some work like an ignorant person does. While taking decisions, some decisions can be like those taken by a foolish person. You can consider bad fields as good and good fields as bad. The same will happen in recognizing people. You can be seen doubting the character of others without considering your own character. Sometimes you may also have to be insulted. The situation will be medium in marital matters. You will get the company of bad people; besides, it is good to be careful of friends, otherwise, you will get trouble. Your journeys can also not be called that successful. You may become worried due to spending more money. In many cases, your money is likely to be wasted unnecessarily, and financial worry will continue to bother you. Wealth accumulated by the father is likely to be destroyed quickly. Besides, there will be fear of enemies, and there can also be loss of wealth due to enemies. There can also be losses from the government. There will be a fear of water. There is a possibility of getting arthritis (rheumatism) and semen-related diseases.
Ketu.7: Ketu is sitting in the eighth place in your birth chart. Ketu sitting in this place will be able to give both auspicious and inauspicious results. You will be seen taking your work very seriously, your interest can also be in sports etc., besides you will be a valiant person and will have a lot of enthusiasm to work. You will be able to be happy in life. You will also continue to have financial gains. You will benefit in any work related to research. You can be associated with some secret knowledge or you will have an interest in this field. You will like to stay in solitude. Wealth will also continue to be received from the government in various fields. As an inauspicious result, the company of some bad people will be dear to you. You will be a greedy and very clever person. You may not even hesitate to cause trouble to someone. Knowingly or unknowingly, you can do some such work which is generally considered a sin. Sometimes, thoughtlessness (lack of conscience) can be observed in the works done by you. You may get anal diseases (piles etc.), oral diseases, and teeth problems. Your financial condition will also not be auspicious, because your earned money can be spent in various works. You may also face problems from vehicles. Disputes or other troubles may arise with friends, or you may have few friends.
Ketu.8: Ketu is in the ninth place in your birth chart. By nature, you are a generous person. You will be a valiant, kind, generous person who gives importance to religion, and interested in charity, religion, and chanting/penance. Your troubles will be less. There is a possibility of you benefiting from lower-level persons. You will also benefit abroad, and your fortune will also rise quickly if you live abroad. Even if you do not get a very good place in society, you will be able to become a happy and lucky person. Your friendship can be with some bad (inauspicious) people, and together with them, you can earn wealth through immoral acts. You will get the happiness of a son, although you will always remain worried regarding your son, and financial gains will continue. In the case of the father, Ketu sitting in this place cannot be called auspicious. Sometimes the religious works done by you can also be for showing off to people. There may be a problem with brothers in some cases, or your relations with them may not be good. You may like the ideas of people of other religions. There will be a feeling of courage in you.
Ketu.9: Ketu planet is sitting in the tenth place in your birth chart. Due to Ketu situated in this place, you will be able to become a strong, radiant, self-realized, intelligent, sociable by nature, having knowledge of various scriptures and arts, winning in all fields, and famous person. Your influence is matchless, and you will be able to become an influential person. Even your opponents will be seen praising you. You will like traveling and roaming, and you will easily be able to defeat your enemies. But this position of Ketu will also provide some inauspicious results. You will waste your hard work on some unnecessary tasks; besides, in some matters, you may also become arrogant. You may lack the happiness of either mother or father. It may be that they live far away. Some worries about your father may keep coming to your mind. Whenever you step forward to do a good work, some obstacles may arise in it. There will also be a fear of vehicles, so it would be better if you remain careful. Trouble may come from animals. You will have to keep your character excellent. You may remain mentally dissatisfied. There will be a fear of goods getting stolen. You may suffer from diseases like piles, leg problems, arthritis, etc.
Ketu.10: Ketu is sitting in the eleventh place in your birth chart. Ketu sitting in this place will give you auspicious results. You will be fond of wearing good clothes, you can be the owner of an attractive and charming personality, and you will be a special kind of radiant person. You will also have the qualities of being kind, valiant, sweet-spoken, generous by nature, always satisfied, and philanthropic. Even if a couple of problems arise in the educational field, everything will be fine later. You are a scholar interested in scriptures, and there will be a smile or a bright glow on your face. You will be an established and popular person. You will easily not fear anyone. Other people will also praise you. There is a possibility of gaining from royal (government) people and the government. At one time, you will have various types of wealth and opulence. You will have income through various means. You are a lucky person. Your house will also be good. You do not want to leave any work incomplete. The enemy will come with fear if they approach you. But, as an inauspicious result of Ketu, you will be a person who worries by assessing various situations. Any work can also be of a type that causes harm to yourself. You can cause loss to yourself even knowingly. You will have stomach problems and worries about children.
Ketu.11: Ketu is sitting in the twelfth place in your birth chart. Ketu sitting in this place will give you both auspicious and inauspicious results. Your eyes can be beautiful to look at. You can be a person with poetic tendencies who has knowledge of scriptures. You can get respect, happiness, and opulence like a king. The field of education will also be good. You will be a person who defeats enemies and destroys them, along with this you will be victorious in debates. You will be seen spending money in religious and auspicious works. Overall, money will be spent on good deeds. Ketu planet will also give you some inauspicious results, as a result of which you can be of a restless nature, and may not easily trust anyone. People may not recognize your nature, and some delusion (confusion) about you will arise in their minds. In some cases, you will also be timid, and some unrest will remain in your mind. You may suffer loss of your old property. Diseases related to the eyes and stomach can occur. Leg and pile problems can also occur. You will face a couple of problems in the case of happiness from your maternal uncle. You will also have to travel a lot in life.
